positive: Minimalist stylized polaroid of a whimsical, bioluminescent forest creature, resembling a stylized otter or playful forest fox, lounging among oversized glowing mushrooms and stylized fern leaves. The creature has smooth, clean lines, vibrant emerald and azure bioluminescence accents, and large, expressive cartoon-like eyes. The composition is highly central and symmetrical, designed for apparel printing. Background should be deep twilight blue and rich forest green, emphasizing silhouettes and strong contrast. Flat, graphic illustration style, perfect for merchandise print, highly detailed linework, vector art quality, high contrast, ethereal glow, cinematic lighting.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, words, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, artifacts, noise, chromatic aberration
